REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE IN SUPPORT OF DEMURRER

LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT MICHEAL ZOOK'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE FRAUD CAUSE OF ACTION. PLAINTIFF HAS 15 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND TO ALLEGE THE CAUSE OF ACTION WITH MORE PARTICULARITY. THE COURT REJECTS DEFENDANT'S REMAINING ARGUMENTS. EVEN IF THE COURT TAKES JUDICIAL NOTICE OF THE DOCUMENTS THAT DEFENDANT PRESENTED, THOSE DOCUMENTS DO NOT SHOW THAT THE PARTIES DID NOT HAVE A PARTNERSHIP. IN ADDITION, THE COMPLAINT AND DOCUMENTS DO NOT SHOW THAT PLAINTIFF'S CLAIMS ARE TIME BARRED. PARAGRAPH 10 OF THE COMPLAINT ALLEGES THAT THE BREACH OCCURRED IN 2014. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: JOHN STEWART; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR #5976

Off Calendar Oct-02-2014 Set For Trial On May-11-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-31-2014 Sustained
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT MICHEAL ZOOK's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained with leave to amend as to the fraud cause of action. Plaintiff has 15 days leave to amend to allege the cause of action with more particularity. The court rejects defendant's remaining arguments. Even if the court takes judicial notice of the documents that defendant presented, those documents do not show that the parties did not have a partnership. In addition, the complaint and documents do not show that plaintiff's claims are time barred. Paragraph 10 of the complaint alleges that the breach occurred in 2014. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: John Stewart; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 =(302/JKS)
